story_sub: The beginning of my babyish life~
story_content: My name is Rocky, a kawaii child meow living in the Cherry Blossom village!
Actually, I've never thought that one day I'll come to the sakura village... But I don't feel bad about this, now I'll share my story og coming there.

At the beginning, I'm not like what I am at this moment, instead, also a very big meow, with my own job, but not living in the Yah-Den Mainland. That's a town, entirely different from there, I do my job, living in a fast-paced life.
Meows is extrememly rare in the town, and I feel lonely in a world without a similar one.
One day, I had nothing to do, going out for a walk, and found a purple child meow, and that's when everything changed.
That child meow is called Dream Cat, who had a giant lollipop in his hand, he decided to take me to a world with only meows, and that's the place, Yah-Den Mainland.

It was so vigorous there, I was infected in seconds after I arrive at the Meow Kingdom. Dream Cat kept taking me to many other place, until when he took me to a cherry forest in the Cherry Blossom Village, a place that remains unknown for many of the meows.
In that place, I came across a attractive pink cherry, so much that I eagered to eat it. Seeing this, Dream Cat decided to help me getting that cherry.
He swung his lollipop, and the cherry came into my hand, mean while, I noticed that a pink cherry pacifier fell from the tree...
I ate the cherry, then I have no impression about what happened next...
When I wake up, I saw Dream Cat watching me. I got up and checked around, and saw that I was in a kindergarten room!
"Don't worry, little cherry meow, I was babysitting you when you were sleeping!"
"Little... Babysitting?!" I checked myself and found that I was wearing kindergarten uniform, and is now the same size as Dream Cat!
"What was going on? Why is this happening? I want to go home!" I started crying like a little child.
"Don't cry, little cherry meow~" Dream Cat took out that cherry pacifier and placed it into my mouth.
I started feeling very weird, the cherry magic stored in the pacifier spreaded through my body very quickly.
"You're so cute with this pacifier!" The Dream cat admired me, patting my head.
"I'm a kawaii cherry meow... A cherry meow that never grows up..." Such thought filled up my mind, I started accepting my new babyish life.
